title: UniProt connector (http.get) — agent-drivable, the agent composes the SQL
description: Same UniProt REST source, but via the http.get resolver (host-supplied fetch) so the AGENT can resolve it with no host ducknng provisioning: it fetches the JSON into a table, then the agent does schema discovery and writes the extraction SQL itself. The manifest declares WHERE the data is; the agent decides WHAT to pull.

resolvers.title: HTTP GET -> table
resolvers.description: Fetch an HTTP JSON body into a table (host-supplied fetch).
